info.title: Financial Datasets API
info.description: Stock market API with real-time and historical financial data for 30,000+ tickers over 30+ years. Financial statements, equity prices, insider trades, SEC filings, and more.

tags.name: Financial Statements
tags.description: Access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements

tags.name: Company Information
tags.description: Company facts like ticker, name, and description

tags.name: Earnings
tags.description: Earnings press releases and related data

tags.name: Crypto
tags.description: Cryptocurrency price data and market information

tags.name: Financial Metrics
tags.description: Financial ratios, metrics, and key performance indicators

post.description: Search for specific financial metrics across income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements for a list of tickers.

x-doc.heading_zh: 搜索指定财务指标 (Search Line Items)
x-doc.desc_en: Search for specific financial line items across income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements for one or more tickers.
x-doc.description_zh: 在一个或多个股票代码的利润表、资产负债表与现金流量表中检索指定的财务行项目。

get.description: Get insider trades like buys and sells for a ticker by a company insider.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

x-doc.desc_en: Stock ticker symbol identifying the company to query.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识目标公司的股票代码。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of transactions to return (default: 10).

x-doc.desc_en: Upper bound on the number of records returned in one response.
x-doc.title_zh: 单次响应返回记录数的上限。

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by insider name (e.g., 'Jen Hsun Huang'). Use the /insider-trades/names endpoint to get available names for a ticker.

x-doc.desc_en: Filter results to a specific insider by name; obtain valid names from the insider-trades names endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 按内部人姓名筛选结果；有效姓名可从内部人姓名查询接口获取。

parameters.name: transaction_type
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type (e.g., 'Open market sale', 'Gift'). Use the /insider-trades/transaction-types endpoint to get available types.

x-doc.desc_en: Filter results to a specific transaction type; obtain valid types from the insider-trades transaction-types endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 按交易类型筛选结果；有效类型可从内部人交易类型查询接口获取。

parameters.name: filing_date
parameters.description: Filter by exact filing date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

x-doc.desc_en: Return only trades filed on this exact date.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回在该确切日期申报的交易。

parameters.name: filing_date_gte
parameters.description: Filter by filing date greater than or equal to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

x-doc.desc_en: Return only trades filed on or after this date.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回在该日期当天或之后申报的交易。

parameters.name: filing_date_lte
parameters.description: Filter by filing date less than or equal to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

x-doc.desc_en: Return only trades filed on or before this date.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回在该日期当天或之前申报的交易。

parameters.name: filing_date_gt
parameters.description: Filter by filing date greater than this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

x-doc.desc_en: Return only trades filed strictly after this date.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回在该日期之后申报的交易。

parameters.name: filing_date_lt
parameters.description: Filter by filing date less than this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

x-doc.desc_en: Return only trades filed strictly before this date.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回在该日期之前申报的交易。

balance_sheet.description: Balance sheet segment breakdowns for this period.

cash_flow_statement.description: Cash flow statement segment breakdowns for this period.

url.description: The URL to the exhibit document on the SEC website.

text.description: The raw text content of the exhibit. Only included when 'include_exhibits' parameter is set to true.

bank.description: The symbol of the central bank.

name.description: The name of the central bank.

rate.description: The interest rate of the central bank.

date.description: The date of the interest rate in YYYY-MM-DD format.

unit.description: Unit of measure (e.g., %, cents, dollars, miles, count).

period.description: Reporting period (e.g., Q4 2025, FY 2025, or a date like 2025-04-30 for non-standard fiscal years).

period_type.description: Whether this is a quarterly or annual figure.

segment.description: Business segment, geography, or sub-category. Only present when the metric is reported for a sub-unit rather than the consolidated entity.

yoy_value.description: Year-over-year comparison value from the prior period.

source_text.description: The source text span from the filing where this value was found.

source_url.description: Direct link to the SEC filing. When available, includes a text fragment that highlights the source in the browser.

point_estimate.description: Single-point guidance when no range is given.

raw_text.description: Original guidance text from the filing.

change_direction.description: Direction: raised, lowered, maintained, initiated, withdrawn.
